subject: LU-4929 lfs: Add lfs dirstripe to the manpage

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

messages.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

(1 comment)

This is good, but what is really missing is that "lfs setdirstripe" is not listed in lustre/doc/lfs.1 at all.  

Since we are working to split the lfs.1 man page into separate per-subcommand pages (see LU-4315 for details) it would be better to create a new lfs-setdirstripe.1 man page and put all the details in there, then reference this from a separate lfs-mkdir.1 page that just contains:

 .so man1/lfs-setdirstripe.1

which is essentially a symbolic link to the other man page.

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

The manpages contain several formatting errors and many of the options are given incorrectly. Please run 'man lustre/doc/lfs-setdirstripe.1' and ensure that each line is formatted correctly according to manpage conventions. Then ensure that each option in the manpage describes the corresponding option of lfs-setdirstripe correctly and conversely that each option of lfs-setdirstripe is present in the manpage. Similarly for the other manpages. Also please review the integrated help messages for lfs-mkdir, setdirstripe, and getdirstripe.

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

(31 comments)

Sorry, I was still reviewing patch #4 when you updated to patch #5.

Some comments on lustre/doc/lfs.1 that couldn't be saved in patch #5 because you don't edit that file anymore.

(defect) The "lfs mkdir" options are the same as "lfs setdirstripe".  Maybe it would be better to just reference setdirstripe:

 .BR "lfs mkdir " [ options ]
 .IR directory ...
 .br
 .TP
 .BR "lfs getdirstripe [ options ]
 .IR directory ...
 .TP
 .BR "lfs setdirstripe [ options ]
 .IR directory ...

or they should all be removed from this file, and users can find them in SEE ALSO.

Add the new pages into the lfs.1 SEE ALSO section:

 .BR lfs-getdirstripe (1),
 .BR lfs-mkdir (1),
 .BR lfs-setdirstripe (1),

commit.subject: LU-4929 lfs: Add lfs dirstripe to the manpage
commit.message:
LU-4929 lfs: Add lfs dirstripe to the manpage

Add lfs-setdirstripe.1, lfs-getdirstripe and
lfs-mkdir.1 to the manpage.

Add -m mode to "lfs mkdir" help, and also mention lfs
setdirstripe can only be done on MDT0 with adminitrator
right.

lfs getdirstripe should honor -O MDTUUID to list the
stripe information of subdirectories located on that MDT.

Remove unnecessary error message in cb_getstripe.

Fix the default getdirstripe behavior, which should list all of
its subdirectories stripe pattern, like lfs getstripe.

Fix format of LMV stripe information.

Change-Id: I7ee6ef3d6df5df50e35f5874a27e176884d79704
Signed-off-by: Wang Di <di.wang@intel.com>
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/10643
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: John L. Hammond <john.hammond@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
